description_long: This rustic wooden cabin features a steeply pitched, multi-tiered gable roof with overlapping shingles and exposed beams. The structure is surrounded by a rough wooden fence and includes an adjacent outhouse, a leafless tree, and scattered outdoor items such as barrels, crates, and a broken cart. The main building has a small covered entryway, a flag hanging from the side, and a weathered appearance with visible planks and cross-bracing. Windows are small and irregularly placed, with some covered by shutters or boards. The ground is uneven, with patches of dirt, grass, and debris, contributing to the abandoned or frontier-like atmosphere. Posters and signs are attached to the walls, adding to the sense of a lived-in, yet neglected, environment.
description: A weathered, rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, surrounded by a fence, outhouse, and scattered outdoor items, evoking an abandoned or frontier setting.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, a covered porch, the outhouse to the right, a leafless tree, and various scattered items like barrels and crates.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the cabin with a hanging flag, the outhouse, and the tree, as well as a poster on the outhouse wall.
description_view_2: The rear and side view reveals more crates and barrels, the flag, and the back of the outhouse, with the fence enclosing the area.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the back and opposite side of the cabin, showing the layered roof structure, boarded windows, and additional fencing.
attribute_roof_type: multi-tiered gable roof with steep pitch, overlapping wooden shingles, and exposed beams
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple small, irregularly placed windows, some covered with shutters or boards, asymmetrical distribution
attribute_door_placement: one main door on the front facade beneath the porch, and a secondary door on the outhouse to the right side
